description: CompositionMagenta sweater made of 100% acrylic, has loose fitting short sleeves, an exaggerated mock neck, a drawstring at the chest for a customised Fit and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis soft sweater from jealous 21 is so plush that it will seem like you never left the comfort of your cosy blanket.
